title: Transactions
description: Mengelola transaksi dan locking di MySQL.

commands.name: START TRANSACTION
commands.title: Start Transaction
commands.notes: Transaksi memastikan semua operasi berhasil atau semua dibatalkan (ACID).

commands.name: COMMIT
commands.title: Commit

commands.name: ROLLBACK
commands.title: Rollback

commands.name: SAVEPOINT
commands.title: Savepoint
commands.syntax: SAVEPOINT nama; / ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT nama; / RELEASE SAVEPOINT nama;

commands.name: LOCK TABLES
commands.title: Lock Tables
commands.notes: Lebih baik gunakan row-level locking (FOR UPDATE) daripada LOCK TABLES.

commands.name: ISOLATION LEVELS
commands.title: Isolation Levels
commands.notes: Default MySQL: REPEATABLE READ. Untuk kebanyakan aplikasi ini sudah cukup.
